title: Amtech - Digital Scale for Luggage, Parcels, and More with Weight Restrictions, LCD Screen with Automatic Off, Easy to Use, Battery Included, Weight Capacity up to 40kg
features: TRAVELLING MUST-HAVE: Easily check the weight of your luggage to make sure you don’t go over weight limits, making going through airports a breeze. Simply clip onto your luggage, lift, and read the weight!
HEAVY LOADS: With a weight capacity up to 40kg/ 88lbs, this scale is perfect for weighing luggage, parcels, and other items where you have a weight restriction.
EASY TO USE: The accurate LCD screen is easy to read and automatically turns off when the scale is not in use. Also supplied with a CR2032 battery.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description This scale has a maximum weight capacity of 40kg (88lbs). Designed with an accurate LCD screen with automatic off, and is ideal for weighing luggage, parcels, and other items. Supplied with a CR2032 battery.
